Pad SR5 +106-109 (4 bytes, AltiumSharp 'user union') — neither side decodes a typed value; template region. Confirm against live Altium.
Pad SR5 +63-66 and +118-120 reserved; cache-validity bytes +94-100 / +103-105 — modelled by AltiumSharp as opaque Cache* bytes 'revalidated on load'; exact per-byte meaning unproven.
Pad SR5 markers +170-171 (00 01), +172 (0x1A PcbLib / 0x12 PcbDoc), +185 (0x03/0x01/0x11) — meaning/allowed values undecoded.
Pad cache word @61-64 (0x01010101 AltiumSharp default vs 0 in golden) — true required value uncertain.
Pad full-stack PadFullStackEntry Flag1-4 and Trailing byte — AltiumSharp documents 'exact semantics layer-stack dependent'; stride observed only as 15.
Pad InternalLayerShapes (29-array) vs PerLayerShapes (32-array) index/layer mapping — asserted by AltiumSharp comments, not byte-proven.
Track/Arc paste_mask_expansion (@39-40 track / @51 arc) and subpoly_index (@33-34) — constant 0 in all goldens; non-zero semantics/units/width unverified.
Whether real Altium ever sets track flag bits outside the modelled mask (no MergeFlags on WriteTrack) — shared limitation with AltiumSharp; needs an out-of-mask track to settle.
Via cache_valid_word@61 / cache_valid_byte@67 — AltiumSharp defaults 0x01010101/0x01 but every golden is 0; required value unconfirmed.
Via tenting location — VIA_TENTING golden has flags=0x000C (no 0x20/0x40 set) and isTenting=False, so where via tenting is encoded is unconfirmed.
Via undecoded constant regions 203-241 (0f 00 03 01 ...), 254-255 (0x002A), 304-307 (30), 308-311 (9), 320 (0x01) — replayed verbatim; semantics unknown but immaterial to byte-correctness.
Text reserved bytes 232-239 (0x80 markers at 235/239) and 242-243 — undecoded by both AltiumSharp and us.
Text fontId@25-26 sign interpretation for ids >0x7FFF — goldens only show small values.
Region KEEPOUTRESTRICTIONS bitmask (31 in KEEPOUT_REGION) — which bit = which restriction (track/via/pad/fill/copper) not decoded.
Region REGION_WITH_HOLE has holeCount=0 despite its name — relationship/precedence between inline hole contours and separate KIND=1 cutout regions not pinned down.

Region/ComponentBody CAVITYHEIGHT/ARCRESOLUTION mil-string rounding for non-round values, and ComponentBody OVERALLHEIGHT formatting (golden STEP 31.4961mil 4dp) — verify our mm_to_mil matches AltiumSharp FormatMilCoord byte-for-byte.
ComponentBody MODEL.CHECKSUM algorithm (which 32-bit hash over which model bytes) — needed to generate a body for a new STEP without a reference value.
ComponentBody whether an IsShapeBased=TRUE body carries hole/cutout vertex arrays like Region — unverified against real bytes.
Mechanical 17-32 layer IDs (our 186-201) — AltiumSharp defines no mapping (returns NoLayer); no golden exercises Mech17-32. Confirm against an AD18+ Altium-saved file.
Special/system layers 75-80, 83-85 (ConnectLayer..DRCDetailLayer) — not in AltiumSharp's name<->byte table and absent from goldens; only PadHole=81/ViaHole=82 corroborated.
High byte of every block-length word (BlockSizeMask 0x00FFFFFF masks it as flags) — always 0 in observed goldens; meaning when set unknown.
Full u16 flag-bit map beyond the 5 modelled bits — 0x0001/0x0002 meaning unverified (locking is encoded via the 0x04 Unlocked bit being clear, so a separate 0x0001 Locked bit is doubtful).
PrimitiveGuids typeId=85 (0x55) leading record semantics (component/footprint-level identity GUID) — opaque round-trip only.
PadViaLibrary template-cache tail and FileVersionInfo/Data key semantics — preserved as opaque blobs; minimal required subset unknown.
LayerKindMapping non-zero signature (MurmurHash2 inputs) — always 0 for PcbLib; PcbDoc-style signature inputs not fully modelled.
